## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss content strategy, reporting, and analytics integration for Diligent](https://fathom.video/share/uQyhz7nRtSuC5-bNbFKYZ7UELtxe_Y3D?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Need to adjust weekly deliverable reports in Slack to align with Diligent's internal solution categories (VLC, ERM, IRC, EMT)](https://fathom.video/share/uQyhz7nRtSuC5-bNbFKYZ7UELtxe_Y3D?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)
  - [Aiming to create a comprehensive dashboard view combining multiple data sources (GA4, GSC, Ahrefs, etc.) for more efficient reporting and AI tool integration](https://fathom.video/share/uQyhz7nRtSuC5-bNbFKYZ7UELtxe_Y3D?tab=summary&timestamp=20.0)
  - [Exploring options to automate weekly reporting and integrate with Diligent's internal systems (Glean AI) to reduce manual work](https://fathom.video/share/uQyhz7nRtSuC5-bNbFKYZ7UELtxe_Y3D?tab=summary&timestamp=34.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Updates

  - [Reviewed calibration piece for NetNew content structure](https://fathom.video/share/uQyhz7nRtSuC5-bNbFKYZ7UELtxe_Y3D?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
  - [Outline includes meta info, pain points, definitions, expert quotes, SEO sections, use cases, trends, and Diligent product focus](https://fathom.video/share/uQyhz7nRtSuC5-bNbFKYZ7UELtxe_Y3D?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)
  - [22 topics still in "considering" status, including AI compliance monitoring which aligns with new prompts](https://fathom.video/share/uQyhz7nRtSuC5-bNbFKYZ7UELtxe_Y3D?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

### Reporting Structure Changes

  - [Request to break down weekly deliverable reports by Diligent's main solution categories](https://fathom.video/share/uQyhz7nRtSuC5-bNbFKYZ7UELtxe_Y3D?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [Categories: VLC, ERM, IRC, EMT](https://fathom.video/share/uQyhz7nRtSuC5-bNbFKYZ7UELtxe_Y3D?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [Jo to implement changes based on details Kezia will provide via Slack](https://fathom.video/share/uQyhz7nRtSuC5-bNbFKYZ7UELtxe_Y3D?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)

### Dashboard Integration Goals

  - [Create a single-view dashboard combining multiple data sources](https://fathom.video/share/uQyhz7nRtSuC5-bNbFKYZ7UELtxe_Y3D?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Aim to upload weekly view into internal AI tool for easier access and searchability](https://fathom.video/share/uQyhz7nRtSuC5-bNbFKYZ7UELtxe_Y3D?tab=summary&timestamp=1030.0)
  - [Include competitor information, target metrics, and various data streams (Ahrefs, GSC, GA4, Scrunch)](https://fathom.video/share/uQyhz7nRtSuC5-bNbFKYZ7UELtxe_Y3D?tab=summary&timestamp=939.0)
  - [Desire for regional breakdowns and executive-level reporting](https://fathom.video/share/uQyhz7nRtSuC5-bNbFKYZ7UELtxe_Y3D?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

### Analytics and Integration Challenges

  - [Current Looker Studio setup limited to GSC and GA4 data](https://fathom.video/share/uQyhz7nRtSuC5-bNbFKYZ7UELtxe_Y3D?tab=summary&timestamp=1048.0)
  - [Unable to directly integrate Ahrefs or SEMrush data due to internal GrowthX constraints](https://fathom.video/share/uQyhz7nRtSuC5-bNbFKYZ7UELtxe_Y3D?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)
  - [Potential need for custom solution or expanded scope to achieve desired integrations](https://fathom.video/share/uQyhz7nRtSuC5-bNbFKYZ7UELtxe_Y3D?tab=summary&timestamp=1578.0)

### Next Steps for Reporting Improvements

  - [Kezia to provide list of desired integrations, metrics, and internal tracking methods](https://fathom.video/share/uQyhz7nRtSuC5-bNbFKYZ7UELtxe_Y3D?tab=summary&timestamp=1963.0)
  - [Explore possibilities for custom dashboard development or alternative solutions](https://fathom.video/share/uQyhz7nRtSuC5-bNbFKYZ7UELtxe_Y3D?tab=summary&timestamp=1852.0)
  - [Review current GA4 setup and potential optimizations for better lead tracking](https://fathom.video/share/uQyhz7nRtSuC5-bNbFKYZ7UELtxe_Y3D?tab=summary&timestamp=1902.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Explore options for custom dashboard development or alternative reporting solutions](https://fathom.video/share/uQyhz7nRtSuC5-bNbFKYZ7UELtxe_Y3D?tab=summary&timestamp=1852.0)
